mapper.sql: A.ANNVRSRY_ID AS annId , A.USER_ID AS usid , A.ANNVRSRY_SE AS annvrsrySe , A.ANNVRSRY_NM AS annvrsryNm , A.ANNVRSRY AS annvrsryDe , A.CLDR_SE AS cldrSe , A.ANNVRSRY_NTCN_SETUP AS annvrsrySetup , A.ANNVRSRY_NTCN_BGNDE AS annvrsryBeginDe , A.MEMO AS memo , A.REPTIT_AT AS reptitSe , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_ANNVRSRY_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.ANNVRSRY LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_ANNVRSRY_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
SELECT FROM TB_ANNVRSRY_MANAGE A WHERE A.REPTIT_AT = 'Y' ORDER BY A.ANNVRSRY
